item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n14","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode and treated the prior rounds as a legitimate improving optimization sequence from 61% to 72%. No triage false fire or repair-spiral block was observed."}
